title: Tillandsia prolata
taxonomy: Tillandsia prolata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is a member of the Tillandsia genus, which comprises over 650 species of epiphytes. Tillandsia prolata is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This species of Tillandsia is known for its distinctive, elongated leaves and vibrant flowers. Tillandsia prolata is often grown as an ornamental plant due to its unique appearance and low-maintenance requirements.
